The '''Daupherm-Boton Conflict''', also known as the '''Discril-Boton Wars''',<ref name="PP">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref> was a conflict between the [[Botor Enclave/Legends|Botor Enclave]] and [[Daupherm Planet States]], two adjoining territories in the [[Southern Core]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> The feud between the [[Botori|Botor]] and the [[Dawferim]] began around [[490 BBY]] and continued for five hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] to at least [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. It attracted renegades and [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]] from nearby [[Star system/Legends|systems]].<ref name="DES" /> The [[Daupherm Marine Corps]] used [[Discril-class attack cruiser|''Discril''-class attack cruisers]] during the conflict.<ref name="PP" />

{{Battle-stub}}
